A. f. Mead. who was expected to
arrive In Spokane today. had not ar
rived at Q o'clock, but is expected to-
night.


MFR. Mead. nominated by the re-
publican party for governor Of the
state of Washington. owes the honor
to the railroad interests of the state.
particularly those of the Great North
ern. The Great Northern's political
managers. most of whom. like James
]. Hin himself. are democrats. con-
trolled the convention and finally die
tated a slate headed by Mr.. Mead.
who had the endorsement of several
of the largest corporations of Bell
ingham. his home city,


Mr.. Mead is a lawyer and a native
of Kansas. having been born In Man
haitian, that state, In 1861. His pa
rents removed to Illinois while he
was still a child. and he was educated
In that state He received his legal
training In Chicago and was admitted
to tho bar there In 1888.
